params.description:
When these cockroaches converge, enough conviction is generated to lead to the collective belief of "The enemy shall be vanquished!" This is similar to low-level creatures like termites escalating in power when they increase in number. The cockroaches are able to communicate telepathically with other intelligent beings in any language.
50,000 Cockroaches: equivalent intelligence of an ordinary mouse
980,000 Cockroaches: equivalent intelligence of an ordinary chimpanzee
11.43 Million Cockroaches: …
